definitions.text: A physical injury caused by heat, cold, electricity, radiation or caustic chemicals.
examples: She had second-degree burns from falling in the bonfire.
He burnt his hand in the fire.

definitions.text: A sensation resembling such an injury.
examples: chili burn from eating hot peppers

definitions.text: To cause to be consumed by fire.
examples: He burned his manuscript in the fireplace.

definitions.text: To be consumed by fire, or in flames.
To overheat so as to make unusable.
examples: He burned the toast. The blacksmith burned the steel.
